name: Amaranth Crepes in Lemon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs in a blender; add other liquids and then flour and salt.
2. Heat a small skillet. Lightly oil the pan.
3. Put 1-1/2 tablespoons butter in the pan and spread it over the surface.
4. Add 1/2 cup batter to the pan and cook until set on one side.
5. Turn the crepe over and cook the other side.
6. Fill cooked crepe with sliced bananas or whipped tofu, then roll up and cover with sauce.
Crepe Filling: Sliced bananas or whipped tofu (see Golden Amaranth Short Cake recipe)
Crepe Sauce: Combine all ingredients except lemon peel in a saucepan; stir and simmer over medium heat until clear and slightly thick. Remove from heat and stir in the peel.
